message:
feat(agent-drivers): add NTM-based work detection patterns (bd-3551)

Add comprehensive work detection utilities based on NTM robot/is-working.go:
- Create work-detection.ts with pattern-based state detection
- Export detectWorkState, isAgentWorking, isAgentIdle utilities
- Integrate into tmux driver's detectActivityState method
- Add context warning event emission when context is low

Detection includes patterns for:
- Tool calling (grep, glob, read, write, edit, etc.)
- Thinking states (analyzing, processing, let me, etc.)
- Agent-specific patterns (claude, codex, gemini)
- Rate limiting and context window warnings
- Idle patterns (shell prompts, waiting for input)

Key principle: NEVER interrupt agents doing useful work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
